Access this property to check the sound event’s playback status. # renderingState

**Instance Property**

The sound event’s playback status.

## Declaration

```swift
var renderingState: PHASESoundEvent.RenderingState { get }
```

## Discussion

Access this property to check the sound event’s playback status. The value reflects the state you control by calling one of the functions: [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESoundEvent/start(completion:)], [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESoundEvent/stopAndInvalidate()], or [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESoundEvent/pause()].

## Checking Playback Status

- **PHASESoundEvent.RenderingState**: The playback status of audio.
